chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7328 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.32129/2021 3. For hearing of main case 14.04.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mirza Nadeem Taqi, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for respondent states that provisional release was allowed vide order dated 20.12.2021. He further states that the assessment etc. has taken place and matter is pending in appeal before the learned Collector Appeals. It is contended that since the issue is already pending before the statutory forum of appropriate jurisdiction therefore this petition may be disposed of with the direction that fate of the security shall be subject to the outcome of the proceedings before the learned Collector Appeals. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
